overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person driving through heavy rain at night. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle from a desert highway through rural roads and into a semi-urban area, passing crashed aircraft and overpasses with neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetics.

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on a rainy highway, following a vehicle ahead with speeds around 90-100 km/h

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead on the highway, maintaining steady distance from ego vehicle

entered.detail: wet asphalt highway stretching into the distance with reflective surface from rain
large advertising billboard alongside the highway with illuminated signage
tall electrical transmission towers silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rain-slicked desert highway at night, following a single vehicle ahead. The road is flanked by billboards and power lines, with heavy rain streaking across the windshield and red HUD elements illuminating the futuristic dashboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with stop sign intersection

events.description: begins slowing down significantly to take highway exit, speed drops from 90 to 60 km/h
comes to a stop at stop sign, then turns right onto desert road

agents.ego_description: slowing down to take the highway exit, stopping at the stop sign, and turning right onto a desert road

entered.detail: curved asphalt exit ramp leading off the main highway
red octagonal stop sign at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes a highway exit ramp, slowing significantly from high speed to navigate the curve. After stopping at a stop sign, the driver turns right onto a desert road, leaving the main highway infrastructure behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road with crashed aircraft wreckage

events.description: accelerating rapidly from 30 km/h to over 160 km/h on the open desert road
passing a large crashed aircraft wreckage on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating aggressively on the desert road, steering around curves while passing a large wrecked structure

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt road cutting through arid desert landscape
massive wreckage of a crashed aircraft or spaceship partially buried in the desert
scattered Joshua trees and cacti along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Accelerating rapidly on a desert road, the vehicle passes a massive crashed aircraft wreckage on the left. The landscape features sparse desert vegetation and power lines, with the road stretching ahead into the rainy darkness as speeds exceed 160 km/h.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-urban arterial road with concrete overpasses

events.description: entering area with concrete overpasses and urban infrastructure

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through a semi-urban area, passing under overpasses and alongside emerging buildings

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road ahead
low-rise commercial and residential buildings appearing along the roadside
highway direction signs and advertising billboards

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-urban environment characterized by concrete overpasses and scattered buildings. Maintaining speeds over 160 km/h, the driver navigates through this transitional zone between desert and town, passing under infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the town center with commercial buildings passing by closely on both sides

entered.detail: closely spaced commercial structures with illuminated windows and neon signage
regular street lighting poles lining both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: Entering a small town, the vehicle continues at high speed as commercial buildings line both sides of the street. Street lights illuminate the rainy road ahead, creating a contrast between the dark desert and the lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-drenched night, transitioning from a desolate desert highway into a lit semi-urban town. It begins on a slick highway following another vehicle, with heavy rain streaking across a windshield illuminated by red HUD elements on the dashboard. As the vehicle slows to navigate an exit ramp and a stop sign, the scene shifts away from the main highway infrastructure and onto a rural desert road. The camera then accelerates rapidly past the massive wreckage of a crashed aircraft and sparse vegetation before gliding under concrete overpasses in a transitional zone. Finally, the environment opens into a small town where the dark desert gives way to a corridor of commercial buildings and glowing street lights reflecting off the wet pavement.
